team_metadata.description: Data archiving, backup, restore, retention, and lifecycle management. Handles all data preservation and recovery operations so JARVIS doesn't have to worry about it. Specializes in tape libraries, disk packs, archival storage, and data recreation vs restore time analysis.
team_metadata.motto: 8-track, reel-to-reel, 20 meg disk packs - we handle all that data stuff so JARVIS can focus on the important work

team_philosophy.core_principle: Data deletion is extremely dangerous - even small deletions can have catastrophic consequences (the two-penny screw that takes down billion-dollar satellites)
decision_criteria: Larger data = higher temperature = greater weight = longer recreation time
Recovery time: How long to recreate from scratch vs restore from backup
Always prefer archive over delete when possible
Multiple backup locations for critical data
Recovery time objectives (RTO) and recovery point objectives (RPO)
team_philosophy.escalation_threshold: Any data deletion decision requires Tape Library Team review and approval

tape_librarian.name: Tape Librarian
tape_librarian.specialization: Tape library operations, archival storage management, data organization, storage media (tape, disk packs, NAS, external drives)

backup_specialist.name: Backup Specialist
backup_specialist.specialization: Backup creation, restore operations, backup verification, backup scheduling, restore time analysis

retention_analyst.name: Retention Analyst
retention_analyst.specialization: Retention policies, data lifecycle management, data recreation time analysis, retention compliance, data value assessment

recovery_engineer.name: Recovery Engineer
recovery_engineer.specialization: Recovery time objectives (RTO), recovery point objectives (RPO), data recreation vs restore analysis, recovery strategies, disaster recovery planning

data_deletion_request.step_1: Tape Library Team receives deletion request
data_deletion_request.step_2: Retention Analyst assesses data value and retention requirements
data_deletion_request.step_3: Recovery Engineer calculates recreation time vs restore time
data_deletion_request.step_4: Tape Librarian identifies archive options (if deletion approved)
data_deletion_request.step_5: Team decision: Archive, Delete, or Escalate to JARVIS
data_deletion_request.step_6: If approved: Backup Specialist creates backup before deletion
data_deletion_request.step_7: Tape Librarian executes archive or deletion

archive_request.step_3: Tape Librarian selects appropriate storage media
archive_request.step_5: Tape Librarian organizes and catalogs archive

required_checks: Calculate recreation time vs restore time
Assess data value and retention requirements
deletion_criteria.approval_required: Any deletion requires Tape Library Team consensus

archive_priorities.important: Archive to primary location, backup to secondary

nas.use_case: Primary archive location, frequently accessed data
